Island Boy Creations draft site context:
- Public identity: Island Boy Creations - Guam / Dwayne Island Boy Creations.
- Public positioning: Guam-born, Malesso-raised, California-based creative/community/devotional personality.
- Public profiles: Instagram @islandboycreations, YouTube @islandboycreations5283.
- Public business listing: art-related services in Antioch, CA, principal Dwayne Guerrero, phone (925) 727-2687.
- Website should avoid unconfirmed claims. Use “custom projects,” “creative storytelling,” “community/devotional media,” and “island-inspired work” unless owner confirms exact products/services.
